caption: The video appears to be a news segment from an Indian news channel, featuring a live report by an ANI correspondent. The reporter is standing outdoors, possibly in a park or a similar open area with trees and grass visible in the background. He is holding a microphone with the ANI logo and speaking into it. The screen displays various political figures and their names, including Tejashwi Yadav, who is identified as the former Deputy Chief Minister of Bihar. The headline at the top of the screen reads "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है," which translates to "Congress shaken up, Tejashwi's 'picture' remains." The segment seems to be discussing political developments involving these figures, with the time displayed as 10:02 PM. The overall tone suggests a breaking news update on current political events.
